name: A quote whose from currency mismatches the source wallet is rejected

parameters.name: wallets
parameters.value: CustomerWallets(root=[Wallet(id=2590, currency=WalletCurrency(code='ETH', quantity_precision=8, price_precision=8), address='simulated-address-780944944', balance=Decimal('3.70000'), available=Decimal('3.70000'), approx_balance=Decimal('3.70000'), approx_available=Decimal('3.70000'), status='ACTIVE'), Wallet(id=2591, currency=WalletCurrency(code='TRX', quantity_precision=6, price_precision=8), address='simulated-address-922707371', balance=Decimal('46500.00'), available=Decimal('46500.00'), approx_balance=Decimal('46500.00'), approx_available=Decimal('46500.00'), status='ACTIVE'), Wallet(id=2592, currency=WalletCurrency(code='USDT', quantity_precision=6, price_precision=8), address='simulated-address-911131006', balance=Decimal('10400.00'), available=Decimal('10400.00'), approx_balance=Decimal('10400.00'), approx_available=Decimal('10400.00'), status='ACTIVE')])

steps.name: Response is <HTTPStatus.BAD_REQUEST: 400> with the expected error detail

parameters.name: response
parameters.value: ApiResponse(status_code=400, json={'detail': 'Request to trade ETH for TRX but source wallet has currency TRX.'}, method=<HTTPMethod.POST>, path='/api/v1/quote')

parameters.value: 'Request to trade ETH for TRX but source wallet has currency TRX.'
